name: RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-19
title: Restyle all [rabbit] prints to [🐇 rabbit 🐇] ICON ━━━ ... ━━━ ICON format
description: Restyle all rabbit-cage hook [rabbit] output to '[🐇 rabbit 🐇] ICON ━━━ MSG ━━━ ICON' format. Covers session-init (R1=🌿, Welcome=✅ + sub-lines), sync-check (remove first-run, add 🔑/✨ icons to bare messages), refresh (🔄 + sub-lines), rabbit-print.schema.json format update, and all test assertions. Per-message spec in session notes 2026-05-19.

history.old_value: Improve session-init.py welcome banner: wording, layout, and per-file descriptions
history.new_value: Restyle all [rabbit] prints to [🐇 rabbit 🐇] ICON ━━━ ... ━━━ ICON format
history.note: Scope expanded from welcome-banner only to full restyle of all hook messages, format contract, and first-run path removal

history.old_value:
The [rabbit] policy injection systemMessage currently reads 'Policy injected at session start' and lists full import paths with no descriptions. Desired improvements:
1. Message: change to welcome-style, e.g. 'Welcome — governing policies loaded'
2. Layout: add a blank line (double newline) between the banner line and the file list
3. Paths: strip to basenames only (e.g. philosophy.md, not .claude/features/policy/philosophy.md)
4. Per-file one-liners: add a short description next to each file:
   · philosophy.md    — machine-first · bounded scope · designed deprecation
   · spec-rules.md    — determinism first; schema contracts; lifecycle ownership
   · coding-rules.md  — think first; simplicity; surgical edits; goal-driven TDD

Note: a direct edit to ws29 was attempted but reverted by sync-check.py surface-drift rebuild (expected — the hook restored the committed copy). The fix must go through the TDD cycle so the committed copy is updated. The test test-RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-18-session-init-single-json.py checks for 'Policy injected' and must be updated to check for 'Welcome' alongside the impl change.
